pages.text: Shaka has a new friend he that only can see.
Mazi “His name is ” he tells Mama....but whenever Mama comes to runs hides Shaka’s room, Mazi and.
laugh Mazi likes to. He makes Shaka laugh too! roll They in the grass and build castles in the sand.
Mazi “Can eat with us?” Shaka asks Papa at dinner. But when Papa looks up, hides Mazi behind the curtains.
One day, Mama tells Shaka, “Papa has a new job. moving We are to another town.”
Mazi “Can come?” Shaka asks Mama. “Ask him.” Mama says. anywhere But Shaka can’t see Mazi.
The next afternoon, big the truck comes. Soon, the house is empty.
can’t But Shaka leave. gone Where has Mazi?
garden Is Mazi in the? jumped Has he over the fence?
Papa “Maybe Mazi’s got a new job too,” Mama says. also “He might have moved away.”
When Shaka gets to the new house, boy there is a next door. Matty “My name is,” says the boy with a smile.
miss “Sometimes we old friends,” Mama says. always “But there is room in our hearts for new ones!”
